steps.title: Signal the explanation
steps.content: The sentence first says Kaihalulu Beach has a strikingly different shade. The rest explains why: ordinary sand gets color from quartz and feldspar, while Kaihalulu's sand gets a red tint from iron oxide and organic matter.

steps.title: Use the colon with though
steps.content: A interrupts "though most" with an unnecessary comma. B uses only a comma before the explanation. D splits the explanation into a fragment-like contrast after a period. A colon correctly introduces the explanation of the different shade. The answer is C.
